PortalLocation: Microsoft Defender portal > Incidents & alerts > Alerts
ReviewPurpose: Review email security alerts such as phishing, malware, and suspicious message activity
EvidenceRule: Sanitize users, subjects, URLs, message IDs, IP addresses, and location data

PortalLocation: Microsoft Defender portal > Incidents & alerts > Incidents
ReviewPurpose: Review grouped security events and investigation context
EvidenceRule: Sanitize incident entities and affected assets

PortalLocation: Microsoft Defender portal > Email entity page
ReviewPurpose: Understand message timeline, detection technology, delivery location, and threat verdict
EvidenceRule: Do not expose message body, headers, sender infrastructure, or routing details

PortalLocation: Microsoft Defender portal > URL entity or alert evidence
ReviewPurpose: Review Safe Links and URL verdict context
EvidenceRule: Do not expose malicious URLs or credential harvesting links

PortalLocation: Microsoft Defender portal > Attachment evidence or alert details
ReviewPurpose: Review Safe Attachments verdict and attachment handling
EvidenceRule: Do not upload or expose real malware or sensitive files
